title: Personal Portfolio Site
description: Build a sleek personal portfolio website with an about section, project showcase, and contact form. Use CSS animations for smooth transitions.
vibePrompt: Build me a modern personal portfolio website with dark mode, smooth scroll navigation, a hero section with my name, an animated project grid, and a contact form. Use HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Create a weather dashboard that fetches real-time weather data from an API and displays forecasts with beautiful charts and icons.
vibePrompt: Create a weather dashboard web app that uses the OpenWeatherMap API. Show current weather, 5-day forecast with icons, and a temperature chart. Include a city search bar. Make it responsive and colorful.

title: Terminal Todo App
description: Build a command-line todo list manager with add, complete, delete, and list features. Store data in a local JSON file.
vibePrompt: Build a CLI todo app in Node.js. Commands: add, list, complete, delete. Store todos in a JSON file. Add colored output and a progress bar showing completion percentage.

title: Live Markdown Previewer
description: A split-pane editor where you type Markdown on the left and see rendered HTML on the right, updating in real time.
vibePrompt: Build a live Markdown previewer with a split-pane layout. Left side is a textarea for Markdown input, right side shows the rendered HTML preview updating in real time. Add syntax highlighting and a copy HTML button.

title: REST API with Express
description: Build a REST API for a bookstore with CRUD operations, input validation, and error handling using Express.js.
vibePrompt: Create a REST API for a bookstore using Express.js and TypeScript. Include CRUD endpoints for books (title, author, ISBN, price). Add input validation, error handling middleware, and Swagger documentation.

title: Classic Snake Game
description: Recreate the classic Snake game in the browser using HTML Canvas. Add score tracking, speed increases, and game-over screen.
vibePrompt: Build a Snake game using HTML Canvas and JavaScript. Include arrow key controls, score display, speed that increases as the snake grows, collision detection, and a game-over screen with restart button.

title: Pomodoro Timer
description: A productivity timer that alternates between 25-minute work sessions and 5-minute breaks with notifications and session tracking.
vibePrompt: Build a Pomodoro timer web app. 25 min work / 5 min break cycles. Include start/pause/reset buttons, a circular progress animation, browser notifications when time's up, and a session counter.

title: Interactive Quiz App
description: Build a trivia quiz app that fetches questions from an API, shows multiple-choice options, tracks score, and displays results.
vibePrompt: Create an interactive quiz app using the Open Trivia Database API. Show one question at a time with multiple-choice answers, a progress bar, score tracking, and an animated results page at the end.

title: Expense Tracker
description: A personal finance app to log expenses, categorize them, and visualize spending patterns with charts.
vibePrompt: Build an expense tracker web app. Users can add expenses with amount, category, and date. Show a pie chart of spending by category and a bar chart of daily spending. Store data in localStorage. Include a monthly summary.

title: AI Chatbot Interface
description: Build a chat interface that connects to an AI API. Features include message history, typing indicators, and a slick UI.
vibePrompt: Build a ChatGPT-style chat interface. Include a message input, chat bubbles for user/AI messages, a typing indicator animation, message timestamps, and a clear chat button. Style it with a dark theme. Connect to any AI API for responses.

title: GitHub Profile Viewer
description: An app that fetches a GitHub user's profile, repos, and contribution stats, displaying them in a beautiful dashboard.
vibePrompt: Build a GitHub profile viewer that takes a username and displays their avatar, bio, follower count, top repositories sorted by stars, and language breakdown. Use the GitHub REST API. Make it look like a developer trading card.

title: File Organizer CLI
description: A CLI tool that scans a directory and automatically organizes files into folders based on their file type.
vibePrompt: Build a CLI file organizer in Node.js. It scans a given directory and moves files into subfolders by type (Images, Documents, Videos, Code, etc.). Add a dry-run mode that shows what would be moved without actually moving anything. Include colored output.

title: Habit Tracker with Streaks
description: Track daily habits with a GitHub-style contribution heatmap showing streaks and completion rates.
vibePrompt: Build a habit tracker web app. Users can add habits and check them off daily. Show a GitHub-style green contribution heatmap for each habit. Display current streak, longest streak, and completion rate. Store data in localStorage.

title: ASCII Art Generator
description: Convert images or text into ASCII art. Support different character sets and output sizes.
vibePrompt: Build a web app that converts uploaded images into ASCII art. Let users choose the character density, output width, and whether to use color. Include a text-to-ASCII-art mode with big block letters. Add a copy and download button.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate harmonious color palettes with copy-to-clipboard hex codes, palette locking, and export features.
vibePrompt: Build a color palette generator like Coolors. Press spacebar to generate 5 random harmonious colors. Click a color to lock it. Show hex, RGB, and HSL values. Add a copy button for each color and an export palette as image feature.

title: Recipe Search API
description: Build an API that lets users search for recipes by ingredients, cuisine, or dietary preferences.
vibePrompt: Create a REST API for recipe search using Express.js. Seed it with 20 recipes. Support search by ingredients (comma-separated), filter by cuisine type and dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free). Include pagination and return results with cooking time and difficulty level.

title: Memory Card Game
description: A card-matching memory game with flip animations, move counter, timer, and difficulty levels.
vibePrompt: Build a memory card matching game. Cards flip with a 3D CSS animation. Include a move counter, timer, and 3 difficulty levels (4x3, 4x4, 6x4 grids). Use emoji as card faces. Add a victory screen with stats and a play-again button.

title: URL Shortener
description: Build a URL shortening service with custom slugs, click tracking, and an analytics dashboard.
vibePrompt: Build a URL shortener with Express.js and SQLite. Users can shorten URLs with optional custom slugs. Track click count and last accessed time. Include a dashboard showing all shortened URLs with their stats. Add QR code generation for each short URL.

title: Generative Art Canvas
description: Create mesmerizing generative art using algorithms. Build interactive patterns with user controls for colors, shapes, and speed.
vibePrompt: Build a generative art web app using HTML Canvas. Create flowing particle systems that respond to mouse movement. Add controls for particle count, color scheme, trail length, and speed. Include a save-as-PNG button.

title: Typing Speed Test
description: A typing speed test app that measures WPM and accuracy, with different text difficulty levels.
vibePrompt: Build a typing speed test like MonkeyType. Show a paragraph of text, highlight the current word, track words per minute and accuracy in real time. Include 15s/30s/60s modes, a results screen with a WPM chart, and a dark mode theme.

title: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: A tool that formats, validates, and visualizes JSON with syntax highlighting and tree view.
vibePrompt: Build a JSON formatter and validator web app. Paste JSON on the left, see formatted output with syntax highlighting on the right. Add a tree view toggle, validation error messages with line numbers, minify/beautify buttons, and a dark code editor theme.

title: Audio Music Visualizer
description: Build a music visualizer that reacts to audio input with colorful bars, waveforms, and particle effects.
vibePrompt: Build a music visualizer using the Web Audio API and Canvas. Analyze audio from a file upload or microphone input. Show frequency bars, a waveform, and floating particles that react to the beat. Add controls for visualization style and color scheme.

title: Real-Time Polling App
description: Create live polls where multiple users can vote and see results update in real time using WebSockets.
vibePrompt: Build a real-time polling app. Users create polls with multiple options. Other users vote and see results animate in real time using WebSockets. Show results as animated bar charts with percentages. Include a shareable poll link.

title: Git Stats CLI Tool
description: A CLI that analyzes a git repository and shows contribution stats, commit frequency, and code churn.
vibePrompt: Build a CLI tool that analyzes a git repo and shows: top contributors, commits per day/week chart (using ASCII bars), most modified files, average commit size, and a code churn heatmap. Use colored terminal output and accept the repo path as an argument.

title: Pixel Art Editor
description: A browser-based pixel art editor with drawing tools, color picker, layers, and export to PNG.
vibePrompt: Build a pixel art editor in the browser. Include a configurable grid (8x8 to 64x64), color picker, pencil/eraser/fill tools, undo/redo, and export to PNG. Add a palette of 16 default colors and the ability to save/load projects to localStorage.

title: Kanban Task Board
description: A drag-and-drop Kanban board with columns for todo, in progress, and done. Add, edit, and reorder tasks.
vibePrompt: Build a Kanban task board with drag-and-drop. Three columns: Todo, In Progress, Done. Users can add cards with title and description, drag them between columns, and reorder within columns. Use smooth drag animations. Store state in localStorage.

title: API Health Monitor
description: A dashboard that periodically checks multiple API endpoints and displays their status, response time, and uptime.
vibePrompt: Build an API health monitoring dashboard. Configure a list of API endpoints to monitor. Show status (up/down), response time, and uptime percentage for each. Auto-refresh every 30 seconds. Include a timeline graph showing response times over the last hour. Add email/webhook alert configuration.

title: Instagram-Style Image Filters
description: Apply Instagram-style filters to images using Canvas. Include preset filters and custom adjustments.
vibePrompt: Build an image filter app. Upload a photo and apply Instagram-style filters (grayscale, sepia, vintage, warm, cool, etc.). Add sliders for brightness, contrast, saturation, and blur. Show before/after comparison. Include a download button for the filtered image.

title: Text Adventure Game Engine
description: Build an interactive text adventure game engine where players make choices that affect the story outcome.
vibePrompt: Build a text adventure game engine in the browser. Define a story as JSON with rooms, items, and choices. Show narrative text with a typewriter effect, present choice buttons, track inventory, and support multiple endings. Create a short sample adventure to demo it.

title: Regex Tester & Visualizer
description: A tool for testing regular expressions with live matching, group highlighting, and a visual explanation of the pattern.
vibePrompt: Build a regex tester tool. Input field for the regex pattern and a textarea for test text. Highlight all matches in real time with different colors for capture groups. Show match details (index, groups). Add common regex pattern presets and a regex cheat sheet sidebar.

title: Secure Password Generator
description: Generate strong passwords with configurable length, character types, and strength indicator.
vibePrompt: Build a password generator web app. Configurable length (8-128), toggles for uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols. Show password strength meter with color indicator. Add one-click copy, bulk generate mode (generate 10 at once), and a passphrase mode that generates memorable word-based passwords.

title: CSV Data Analyzer
description: Upload a CSV file and get instant statistics, charts, and data previews without any setup.
vibePrompt: Build a CSV analyzer web app. Drag-and-drop a CSV file to upload. Show a data table preview, column statistics (min, max, mean, median for numbers), value frequency counts, and auto-generated charts (histogram for numbers, bar chart for categories). All processing in the browser, no server needed.

title: NPM Package Scaffolder
description: A CLI tool that scaffolds a new npm package with TypeScript, testing, linting, and CI/CD config.
vibePrompt: Build an interactive CLI that scaffolds a new npm package. Ask for package name, description, and features (TypeScript, Jest tests, ESLint, GitHub Actions CI). Generate package.json, tsconfig, test setup, README with badges, .gitignore, and a sample source file. Use prompts with colored output.

title: Tetris Clone
description: Build a playable Tetris game with all standard pieces, rotation, line clearing, scoring, and levels.
vibePrompt: Build a Tetris clone using HTML Canvas. Include all 7 tetromino shapes with proper rotation, ghost piece preview, next piece display, line clearing with animation, scoring system, level progression with speed increase, and game-over detection. Add keyboard controls and a high score saved to localStorage.

title: Markdown Note-Taking App
description: A note-taking app with Markdown support, folder organization, search, and local storage.
vibePrompt: Build a note-taking web app like a mini Notion. Features: create/edit/delete notes with Markdown support, organize notes into folders, full-text search, and auto-save to localStorage. Use a sidebar for navigation and a main content area with a Markdown editor that shows a live preview.

title: API Mock Server Generator
description: A tool that generates a mock API server from a JSON schema or OpenAPI spec for frontend development.
vibePrompt: Build a CLI tool that takes a JSON file defining endpoints and generates a working Express mock server. Support GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, configurable response delays, random data generation using Faker.js patterns, and CORS enabled by default. Include a web UI to view and edit mock responses on the fly.

title: Landing Page Generator
description: An AI-powered tool that generates a complete landing page from a text description of the product.
vibePrompt: Build a landing page generator. User enters a product name and description. Generate a complete responsive landing page with hero section, features grid, testimonials, pricing table, and call-to-action. Let users pick a color scheme. Show a live preview and include a download-as-HTML button.

title: 2D Platformer Game
description: Build a simple 2D platformer with a character that can run, jump, and collect coins across levels.
vibePrompt: Build a 2D platformer game using HTML Canvas. A character can run left/right and jump. Add platforms at different heights, collectible coins, a score display, and simple enemy AI that walks back and forth. Include 3 levels that get progressively harder. Add sound effects for jump and coin collection.

title: Data Pipeline CLI
description: A CLI tool that chains data transformations: read CSV → filter → transform → output JSON/chart.
vibePrompt: Build a data pipeline CLI in Node.js. Read a CSV file, apply transformations via command flags: --filter 'column=value', --sort 'column', --select 'col1,col2', --groupby 'column'. Output as formatted table, JSON, or CSV. Add a --chart flag that generates an ASCII bar chart in the terminal.

title: Tab Manager Browser Extension
description: A browser extension that groups, saves, and restores tab sessions for better tab management.
vibePrompt: Build a Chrome browser extension for tab management. Features: view all open tabs in a popup, group tabs by domain, save tab sessions with a name, restore saved sessions, close duplicate tabs, and search across all tabs. Use a clean popup UI with icons.

title: Event Countdown Timer
description: A beautiful countdown timer to a future event with animated flipping number cards.
vibePrompt: Build an event countdown timer web app. User enters an event name and date. Show a beautiful countdown with flipping number cards (days, hours, minutes, seconds). Add confetti animation when the countdown reaches zero. Support multiple events and share countdown links.

title: GraphQL API for Movies
description: Build a GraphQL API for a movie database with queries, mutations, and relationships between movies, actors, and directors.
vibePrompt: Build a GraphQL API for a movie database using Apollo Server. Define types for Movie, Actor, and Director with relationships. Include queries for listing/searching movies, and mutations for adding reviews. Seed with 10 movies. Add filtering by genre and year.

title: Code Screenshot Tool
description: A tool that turns code snippets into beautiful, shareable images with syntax highlighting and themes.
vibePrompt: Build a code-to-image tool like Carbon. Paste code into an editor with syntax highlighting. Choose from themes (dracula, monokai, github, etc.), set background color/gradient, window chrome style, font size, and padding. Export as PNG. Support 10+ programming languages.

title: Fitness Workout Logger
description: A mobile-friendly web app to log workouts, track progress, and visualize exercise stats over time.
vibePrompt: Build a mobile-first fitness workout logger. Users can create workout templates (exercises, sets, reps, weight), log completed workouts, and view progress charts for each exercise over time. Include a timer for rest periods between sets. Store data in localStorage. Use a bottom navigation bar.

title: Emoji Search Engine
description: A fast emoji search tool with keyword search, categories, skin tone modifiers, and one-click copy.
vibePrompt: Build an emoji search engine. Load all Unicode emojis with metadata. Add instant search by keyword, category filters, skin tone selector, recently used section, and one-click copy to clipboard. Show emoji name and Unicode on hover. Make it feel snappy with virtual scrolling for the emoji grid.

title: Terminal Dashboard
description: A real-time terminal dashboard showing system stats like CPU, memory, disk, and network usage.
vibePrompt: Build a terminal dashboard using blessed or ink (React for CLI). Show real-time boxes for: CPU usage bar, memory usage pie chart, disk space, network throughput, top processes, and system uptime. Auto-refresh every second. Use colors and Unicode box-drawing characters.

title: Collaborative Drawing Canvas
description: A real-time collaborative drawing app where multiple users can draw on the same canvas simultaneously.
vibePrompt: Build a collaborative drawing canvas. Multiple users can draw on the same canvas in real time using WebSockets. Include tools: pencil, eraser, shapes (rectangle, circle), color picker, line thickness slider. Show cursors of other users with their names. Add an undo button and clear canvas option.
